chosen_action.title: Repo conversion proof asset: tomorrow-morning scorecard

why_this_action.summary: Conversion to free use is still the bottleneck, the execution board has no truthful do-now external packet in the current review window, and a durable repo-first evaluator scorecard is a real do-now asset that improves the Codeberg-first trial path immediately.
supporting_reasons: ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md names proof assets and the free-use path as the highest-priority adoption work.
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json marks conversion_to_free_use as the current bottleneck and warns against repeating same-family publisher churn during overlapping measurement windows.

marketing_execution_board_latest.md says there is no truthful do-now packet in the current review window, so this slot needed either a different executable lane or a concrete architecture/process repair.
market_intelligence_latest.json preserves the Codeberg-first / GitHub-mirror positioning and four core truths reused in the new asset.

result.summary: Shipped a new Codeberg-first tomorrow-morning scorecard proof asset and linked it into the repo-first trial path so evaluators can judge the first run in 10 minutes instead of trusting an agent summary.

measurement_contract.expected_outcome: Higher-quality Codeberg-first evaluator conversion from repo traffic that is already arriving during current external measurement windows.
measurement_contract.review_window: 2026-06-01T23:11:13+02:00 for first-path engagement review; 2026-06-08T23:11:13+02:00 for repo-visit review.
measurement_contract.replacement_condition: If Codeberg movement and evaluator-path clarity are still flat after the current Apollo review window, replace this proof-asset angle with a different repo-first conversion surface rather than repeating the same docs pass.

checks: Confirmed the new scorecard file exists with Codeberg-first routing and a concrete 10-minute checklist.
Confirmed README.md links the new scorecard in the main route-to-use list.
Confirmed START_HERE.md, docs/README.md, and docs/first-task-guide.md all link the new scorecard.
